host.renderer_observation: OpenGL ES 3.0 Renderer: Intel(R) Iris(R) Xe Graphics

deterministic_or_resource.command_contract: Godot 3.5.3 --no-window --audio-driver Dummy; add --fixed-fps 60 only for frame determinism

performance.command_contract: Visible Windows Release build with real time and actual rendering driver; do not use --no-window or --fixed-fps

manual_visual_audio.command_contract: Use a visible game window and actual audio device

limitations: No release benchmark is claimed in Phase 00.
VSync state is not pinned by project.godot and must be recorded by the Phase 39 release environment.
